title: Basil Buttercrust
description: A buttery, gooey Australian dish featuring fresh basil, perfect for a show-off breakfast or dessert. This recipe is also suitable for those following a low FODMAP diet.

ingredients.name: Melted Coconut Milk or Heavy Cream

instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine almond flour and finely chopped basil leaves.
Add room-temperature coconut oil and vanilla extract to the mixture, stirring until well combined. Then add lightly beaten eggs and melted coconut milk or heavy cream, continuing to mix until smooth.
Pour the mixture into a greased baking dish (approximately 8x8 inches) and bake for about 20 minutes or until golden brown on top.
Let it cool slightly before serving.
